description: Methods to facilitate the Framespace Workbench

listSpineInstanceTrees.description: List all distinct spine instance tree IDs in the graph.

getProcessStats.description: Get backend process memory and CPU usage.

getReps.description: List all registered reps with their source file paths.

openFile.description: Open a file in an editor. Command is the editor binary (e.g. "code"), file is an absolute path optionally with :line suffix.
